basic_details.job_title: DCPU Thanjavur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 18 Supervisor and Case Worker Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Thanjavur (DCPU Thanjavur)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Thanjavur (DCPU Thanjavur) Supervisor and Case Worker Notification 2026 has been released on 23 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Thanjavur Supervisor and Case Worker Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years. Age relaxation up to 52 years for candidates who worked in Child Help Desk.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor degree in Social Work/Computer Science/Information Technology/Sociology/Social Science, 12th Standard Pass
qualification.details: Railway Help Center Supervisor: Bachelor degree in Social Work/Computer Science/Information Technology/Sociology/Social Science from a recognized university and computer proficiency. Preference to those who worked in Child Help Desk. Railway Help Center Case Worker: 12th standard pass from a recognized school with good communication skills. Preference to those who worked in Child Help Desk. Bus Stand Help Center Supervisor (Kumbakonam and Pattukottai): Bachelor degree in Social Work/Computer Science/Information Technology/Sociology/Social Science from a recognized university and computer proficiency. Preference to those who worked in Child Help Desk. Bus Stand Help Center Case Worker (Kumbakonam and Pattukottai): 12th standard pass from a recognized school with good communication skills. Preference to those who worked in Child Help Desk.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Thanjavur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Thanjavur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Thanjavur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Thanjavur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Railway Help Center Supervisor: Bachelor degree in Social Work/Computer Science/Information Technology/Sociology/Social Science from a recognized university and computer proficiency. Preference to those who worked in Child Help Desk. Railway Help Center Case Worker: 12th standard pass from a recognized school with good communication skills. Preference to those who worked in Child Help Desk. Bus Stand Help Center Supervisor (Kumbakonam and Pattukottai): Bachelor degree in Social Work/Computer Science/Information Technology/Sociology/Social Science from a recognized university and computer proficiency. rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Thanjavur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Thanjavur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Thanjavur Supervisor and Case Worker posts is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Supervisor and Case Worker posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 18 vacancies for Supervisor and Case Worker posts released by the District Child Protection Unit Thanjavur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Supervisor posts?
faq.answer: For Supervisor posts, candidates need a Bachelor's degree in Social Work, Computer Science, Information Technology, Sociology, or Social Science from a recognized university, along with computer proficiency.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 42 years. However, age relaxation up to 52 years is provided for candidates with prior experience in Child Help Desk.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Case Worker posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Case Worker posts is Rs. 18000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DCPU Thanjavur recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DCPU Thanjavur recruitment includes Document Verification and an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the DCPU Thanjavur recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline by downloading the application form, filling it correctly, and sending it to the official address before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the District Child Protection Unit Thanjavur located?
faq.answer: The District Child Protection Unit Thanjavur is located in Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu, with a pincode of 613007.
